commit.message:
fix: 워처 플로우에서 thinking DM 미전송 버그 수정

SoulstreamBackendImpl.run()에서 on_progress/on_compact가 None일 때
update_message_fn이 있으면 build_progress_callbacks()를 자동 호출하여
콜백 쌍을 생성하도록 수정.

트렐로 워처가 soulstream.run()을 호출할 때 progress 콜백을 전달하지
않아 thinking이 DM으로 보내지지 않던 문제를 해결.

- SoulstreamBackendImpl.__init__에 update_message_fn 파라미터 추가
- run()에서 on_progress=None이고 update_message_fn이 있으면 자동 생성
- init_plugin_backends()에 update_message_fn 파라미터 전달
- main.py에서 update_message를 init_plugin_backends에 전달
- update_message_fn이 None이면 기존 동작 유지 (하위 호환)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add OpenAI-compatible frontend support (TRITON_OPENAI_FRONTEND)

When TRITON_OPENAI_FRONTEND=true, triton-serve execs python3 main.py
(Triton's OpenAI-compatible FastAPI frontend) instead of the
tritonserver binary. The frontend embeds Triton in-process via Python
bindings and serves an OpenAI API on port 9000, with optional KServe
HTTP/gRPC frontends alongside it.

New env vars: TRITON_OPENAI_FRONTEND, TRITON_OPENAI_PORT,
TRITON_OPENAI_MAIN (auto-discovered), TRITON_OPENAI_TOKENIZER.

triton-preflight now dynamically includes the OpenAI port in its
multi-port scan and detects openai_frontend processes in addition to
tritonserver.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: bust Chromium SW cache by embedding bridge port in entry file

Chromium caches service worker scripts across sessions. Since the
entry file content was identical between runs, imported scripts
(including the polyfill with bridge port/token) were served from
cache with stale connection details. Adding the bridge port as a
comment forces Chromium to detect a byte change and re-fetch all
imported modules.

* feat: add MobileTabBar component

* feat: add MobileCaseView with drill-down navigation

* feat: add MobileLayout with tab switching

* feat: make ControlPanel responsive with mobile prop

* feat: conditional mobile/desktop layout in App.tsx

* feat: adapt SearchPalette and SettingsModal for mobile

* feat: add mobile header with logo and settings

* feat: adapt CaseDetail for mobile, improve touch targets on ControlPanel

* refactor: separate mobile components from desktop, add mobileUIStore

- Revert desktop components (ControlPanel, SearchPalette, SettingsModal, CaseDetail) to remove all mq.mobile overrides
- Create mobile-specific components in src/components/ui/mobile/ (MobileControlPanel, MobileSearchPalette, MobileSettingsPanel, MobileCaseDetail)
- Add mobileUIStore for tab/screen navigation with cross-store subscription
- Move boot logic (auth init, data fetch) from Sidebar to App.tsx for mobile support
- Fix CaseCard: disable inline rename on mobile, direct showCaseDetail() call
- Remove orphaned MobileSettingsModal, clean up unused mq export from theme

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: always switch to cube tab on algorithm tap in mobile

Previously, tapping an already-selected algorithm didn't trigger the
cross-store subscription since selectedAlgorithmId didn't change.
Now AlgorithmCard directly calls setState on mobile, matching the
CaseCard pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: extract randomCase to browseStore, change default to 'all'

- Move random case logic from Sidebar inline to browseStore.randomCase()
  so both desktop and mobile can use it
- Change randomSource default from 'todo' to 'all'
- Simplify Sidebar by removing duplicated pool computation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent play button layout shift, double tab bar height

- PlayButton: fixed width instead of min-width, remove font-weight toggle
- MobileTabBar: padding 10px → 20px for larger touch targets

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: move ControlPanel above TabBar in layout hierarchy

ControlOverlay was inside CubeTab (position: absolute), so it didn't
stack with the TabBar. Now it sits between TabContent and TabBar in
the flex column, only shown on cube tab.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor: address code review findings (5 improvements)

1. Restore RandomButton disabled/title — add randomPoolSize() getter
   to browseStore, use in Sidebar and MobileLayout
2. Move useIsMobile from CaseCard to CaseList — single hook call
   instead of per-card, pass as prop
3. Merge MobileCaseDetail into CaseDetail — add compact prop for
   mobile styling, delete duplicate 346-line file
4. ControlOverlay display:none instead of unmount — preserves
   MobileControlPanel state (play, keyboard listeners) across tabs
5. Use getState() for randomCase — avoid subscribing to function ref

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: click case number to toggle TODO (desktop only)

CaseNumber (#1, #2, etc.) now toggles TODO on click in desktop.
Disabled on mobile to avoid interfering with card tap navigation.

commit.message:
v5.3.20: Natural language command bar + iManage COM integration

Add Claude tool use API integration for natural language commands in Agent Mode.
Users can now type prompts like "save this to iManage" or "go to redline" and
EmmaNeigh will parse intent and execute the action via Claude's tool use.

New features:
- 10 COMMAND_TOOLS definitions for Claude tool use API
- iManage COM integration via PowerShell (browse, save, checkout, checkin, search, versions)
- execute-command IPC handler with model fallback chain
- dispatchTool() router for all tool calls
- Agent panel now tries Claude tool use first, falls back to agent-plan
- IPC listeners for navigate-tab, trigger-redline, trigger-email-search
